label: Integrations
landing_description: We sync with the tools you already use. Stop jumping between apps and see the full picture of your performance.
connect_strava_subtitle: Import your activities and training data from Strava.
connect_strava_meta: Connect your Strava account to import activities and sync training data.
connect_strava_disabled_desc: Strava integration is temporarily unavailable. We are working to restore it as soon as possible.
connect_fitbit_subtitle: Connect your Fitbit account to sync nutrition, sleep, and heart-rate trends.
connect_fitbit_meta: Connect your Fitbit account to sync nutrition, sleep, and heart-rate trends.
connect_wahoo_subtitle: Sync your workouts and training plans with Wahoo Cloud.
connect_wahoo_meta: Connect your Wahoo account to sync activities and planned workouts.
connect_whoop_subtitle: Connect your WHOOP account to sync recovery and sleep data.
connect_whoop_meta: Connect your WHOOP account to sync recovery, sleep, and strain data.
connect_whoop_disabled_desc: WHOOP connections are currently disabled on coachwatts.com.
connect_oura_subtitle: Connect your Oura account to sync readiness, sleep, and activity data.
connect_oura_meta: Connect your Oura account to sync readiness, sleep, and activity data.
connect_withings_subtitle: Connect your Withings account to sync weight and body composition data.
connect_withings_meta: Connect your Withings account to sync weight and body composition data.
connect_hevy_subtitle: Enter your Hevy API key to connect your account.
connect_hevy_meta: Connect your Hevy account to import strength training workouts.
connect_intervals_subtitle: Enter your Intervals.icu credentials to connect your account.
connect_intervals_meta: Connect your Intervals.icu account to import activities and training data.
connect_intervals_missing_desc: Please enter both your Athlete ID and API key
connect_yazio_subtitle: Track your nutrition and fueling for optimized performance.
connect_yazio_meta: Connect your Yazio account to track nutrition, calories, and macros.
